aboleth.traits.amphibious.name: Amphibious
aboleth.traits.amphibious.text: The aboleth can breathe air and water.

aboleth.traits.eldritch-restoration.name: Eldritch Restoration
aboleth.traits.eldritch-restoration.text: If destroyed, the aboleth gains a new body in 5d10 days, reviving with all its Hit Points in the Far Realm or another location chosen by the GM.

aboleth.traits.legendary-resistance.name: Legendary Resistance
aboleth.traits.legendary-resistance.text: (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair) If the aboleth fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

aboleth.traits.mucus-cloud.name: Mucus Cloud
aboleth.traits.mucus-cloud.text: While underwater, the aboleth is surrounded by mucus. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 14, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the aboleth at the end of the aboleth's turn. Failure: The target is cursed. Until the curse ends, the target's skin becomes slimy, the target can breathe air and water, and it can't regain Hit Points unless it is underwater. While the cursed creature is outside a body of water, the creature takes 6 (1d12) Acid damage at the end of every 10 minutes unless moisture is applied to its skin before those minutes have passed.

aboleth.traits.probing-telepathy.name: Probing Telepathy
aboleth.traits.probing-telepathy.text: If a creature the aboleth can see communicates telepathically with the aboleth, the aboleth learns the creature's greatest desires.

aboleth.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
aboleth.actions.multiattack.text: The aboleth makes two Tentacle attacks and uses either Consume Memories or Dominate Mind if available.

aboleth.actions.tentacle.name: Tentacle
aboleth.actions.tentacle.text: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 15 ft. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from one of four tentacles.

aboleth.actions.consume-memories.name: Consume Memories
aboleth.actions.consume-memories.text: Intelligence Saving Throw: DC 16, one creature within 30 feet that is Charmed or Grappled by the aboleth. Failure: 10 (3d6) Psychic damage. Success: Half damage. Failure or Success: The aboleth gains the target's memories if the target is a Humanoid and is reduced to 0 Hit Points by this action.

aboleth.actions.dominate-mind.name: Dominate Mind
aboleth.actions.dominate-mind.text: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 16, one creature the aboleth can see within 30 feet. Failure: The target has the Charmed condition until the aboleth dies or is on a different plane of existence from the target. While Charmed, the target acts as an ally to the aboleth and is under its control while within 60 feet of it. In addition, the aboleth and the target can communicate telepathically with each other over any distance. The target repeats the save whenever it takes damage as well as after every 24 hours it spends at least 1 mile away from the aboleth, ending the effect on itself on a success.

aboleth.legendaryActions.lash.name: Lash
aboleth.legendaryActions.lash.text: The aboleth makes one Tentacle attack.

aboleth.legendaryActions.psychic-drain.name: Psychic Drain
aboleth.legendaryActions.psychic-drain.text: If the aboleth has at least one creature Charmed or Grappled, it uses Consume Memories and regains 5 (1d10) Hit Points.

ankheg.actions.acid-spray.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 30-foot-long, 5-foot-wide Line. Failure: 14 (4d6) Acid damage. Success: Half damage.

ankylosaurus.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
ankylosaurus.actions.multiattack.text: The ankylosaurus makes two Tail attacks.

ankylosaurus.actions.tail.name: Tail
ankylosaurus.actions.tail.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

ape.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
ape.actions.multiattack.text: The ape makes two Fist attacks.

ape.actions.fist.name: Fist
ape.actions.fist.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Bludgeoning damage.

ape.actions.rock.name: Rock
ape.actions.rock.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 25/50 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage.

archelon.traits.amphibious.name: Amphibious
archelon.traits.amphibious.text: The archelon can breathe air and water.

archelon.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
archelon.actions.multiattack.text: The archelon makes two Bite attacks.

archelon.actions.bite.name: Bite
archelon.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

archmage.traits.magic-resistance.name: Magic Resistance
archmage.traits.magic-resistance.text: The archmage has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

archmage.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
archmage.actions.multiattack.text: The archmage makes four Arcane Burst attacks.

archmage.actions.arcane-burst.name: Arcane Burst
archmage.actions.arcane-burst.text: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 ft. or range 150 ft. Hit: 27 (4d10 + 5) Force damage.

archmage.actions.spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
archmage.actions.spellcasting.text: The archmage casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17): At Will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Disguise Self, Invisibility, Light, Mage Armor (included in AC), Mage Hand, Prestidigitation. 2/Day Each: Fly, Lightning Bolt (level 7 version). 1/Day Each: Cone of Cold (level 9 version), Mind Blank (cast before combat), Scrying, Teleport.

archmage.bonusActions.misty-step.name: Misty Step
archmage.bonusActions.misty-step.text: The mage casts Misty Step, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

archmage.reactions.protective-magic.name: Protective Magic
archmage.reactions.protective-magic.text: The archmage casts Counterspell or Shield in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

assassin.traits.evasion.name: Evasion
assassin.traits.evasion.text: If the assassin is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the assassin instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save and only half damage if it fails. It can't use this trait if it has the Incapacitated condition.

assassin.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
assassin.actions.multiattack.text: The assassin makes three attacks, using Shortsword or Light Crossbow in any combination.

assassin.actions.shortsword.name: Shortsword
assassin.actions.shortsword.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) Piercing damage plus 17 (5d6) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the assassin's next turn.

assassin.actions.light-crossbow.name: Light Crossbow
assassin.actions.light-crossbow.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +7, range 80/320 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Piercing damage plus 21 (6d6) Poison damage.

assassin.bonusActions.cunning-action.name: Cunning Action
assassin.bonusActions.cunning-action.text: The assassin takes the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

awakened-shrub.actions.rake.name: Rake
awakened-shrub.actions.rake.text: Melee Attack Roll: +1, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Slashing damage.

awakened-tree.actions.slam.name: Slam
awakened-tree.actions.slam.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage.

axe-beak.actions.beak.name: Beak
axe-beak.actions.beak.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) Slashing damage.

azer-sentinel.traits.fire-aura.name: Fire Aura
azer-sentinel.traits.fire-aura.text: At the end of each of the azer's turns, each creature of the azer's choice in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the azer takes 5 (1d10) Fire damage unless the azer has the Incapacitated condition.

azer-sentinel.traits.illumination.name: Illumination
azer-sentinel.traits.illumination.text: The azer sheds Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet.

azer-sentinel.actions.burning-hammer.name: Burning Hammer
azer-sentinel.actions.burning-hammer.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

baboon.traits.pack-tactics.name: Pack Tactics
baboon.traits.pack-tactics.text: The baboon has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the baboon's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

baboon.actions.bite.name: Bite
baboon.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +1, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 (1d4 - 1) Piercing damage.

badger.actions.bite.name: Bite
badger.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

balor.traits.death-throes.name: Death Throes
balor.traits.death-throes.text: The balor explodes when it dies. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 20, each creature in a 30-foot Emanation originating from the balor. Failure: 31 (9d6) Fire damage plus 31 (9d6) Force damage. Success: Half damage. Failure or Success: If the balor dies outside the Abyss, it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

balor.traits.fire-aura.name: Fire Aura
balor.traits.fire-aura.text: At the end of each of the balor's turns, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the balor takes 13 (3d8) Fire damage.

balor.traits.legendary-resistance.name: Legendary Resistance
balor.traits.legendary-resistance.text: (3/Day) If the balor fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

balor.traits.magic-resistance.name: Magic Resistance
balor.traits.magic-resistance.text: The balor has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

balor.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
balor.actions.multiattack.text: The balor makes one Flame Whip attack and one Lightning Blade attack.

balor.actions.flame-whip.name: Flame Whip
balor.actions.flame-whip.text: Melee Attack Roll: +14, reach 30 ft. Hit: 18 (3d6 + 8) Force damage plus 17 (5d6) Fire damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, the balor pulls the target up to 25 feet straight toward itself, and the target has the Prone condition.

balor.actions.lightning-blade.name: Lightning Blade
balor.actions.lightning-blade.text: Melee Attack Roll: +14, reach 10 ft. Hit: 21 (3d8 + 8) Force damage plus 22 (4d10) Lightning damage, and the target can't take Reactions until the start of the balor's next turn.

balor.bonusActions.teleport.name: Teleport
balor.bonusActions.teleport.text: The balor teleports itself or a willing demon within 10 feet of itself up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space the balor can see.

bandit.actions.scimitar.name: Scimitar
bandit.actions.scimitar.text: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) Slashing damage.

bandit.actions.light-crossbow.name: Light Crossbow
bandit.actions.light-crossbow.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +3, range 80/320 ft. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) Piercing damage.

bandit-captain.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
bandit-captain.actions.multiattack.text: The bandit makes two attacks, using Scimitar and Pistol in any combination.

bandit-captain.actions.scimitar.name: Scimitar
bandit-captain.actions.scimitar.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Slashing damage.

bandit-captain.actions.pistol.name: Pistol
bandit-captain.actions.pistol.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 30/90 ft. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) Piercing damage.

bandit-captain.reactions.parry.name: Parry
bandit-captain.reactions.parry.text: Trigger: The bandit is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. Response: The bandit adds 2 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

barbed-devil.traits.barbed-hide.name: Barbed Hide
barbed-devil.traits.barbed-hide.text: At the start of each of its turns, the devil deals 5 (1d10) Piercing damage to any creature it is grappling or any creature grappling it.

barbed-devil.traits.diabolical-restorati.name: Diabolical Restoration
barbed-devil.traits.diabolical-restorati.text: If the devil dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

barbed-devil.traits.magic-resistance.name: Magic Resistance
barbed-devil.traits.magic-resistance.text: The devil has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

barbed-devil.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
barbed-devil.actions.multiattack.text: The devil makes one Claws attack and one Tail attack, or it makes two Hurl Flame attacks.

barbed-devil.actions.claws.name: Claws
barbed-devil.actions.claws.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13) from both claws.

barbed-devil.actions.tail.name: Tail
barbed-devil.actions.tail.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. Hit: 14 (2d10 + 3) Slashing damage.

barbed-devil.actions.hurl-flame.name: Hurl Flame
barbed-devil.actions.hurl-flame.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 150 ft. Hit: 17 (5d6) Fire damage. If the target is a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it starts burning.

basilisk.actions.bite.name: Bite
basilisk.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

basilisk.bonusActions.petrifying-gaze.name: Petrifying Gaze
basilisk.bonusActions.petrifying-gaze.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. If the basilisk sees its reflection in the Cone, the basilisk must make this save. First Failure: The target has the Restrained condition and repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still Restrained, ending the effect on itself on a success. Second Failure: The target has the Petrified condition instead of the Restrained condition.

bat.actions.bite.name: Bite
bat.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

bearded-devil.traits.magic-resistance.name: Magic Resistance
bearded-devil.traits.magic-resistance.text: The devil has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

bearded-devil.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
bearded-devil.actions.multiattack.text: The devil makes one Beard attack and one Infernal Glaive attack.

bearded-devil.actions.beard.name: Beard
bearded-devil.actions.beard.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the devil's next turn. Until this poison ends, the target can't regain Hit Points.

bearded-devil.actions.infernal-glaive.name: Infernal Glaive
bearded-devil.actions.infernal-glaive.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 10 ft. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) Slashing damage. If the target is a creature and doesn't already have an infernal wound, it is subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12. Failure: The target receives an infernal wound. While wounded, the target loses 5 (1d10) Hit Points at the start of each of its turns. The wound closes after 1 minute, after a spell restores Hit Points to the target, or after the target or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to stanch the wound, doing so by succeeding on a DC 12 Wisdom (Medicine) check.

behir.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
behir.actions.multiattack.text: The behir makes one Bite attack and uses Constrict.

behir.actions.bite.name: Bite
behir.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 10 ft. Hit: 19 (2d12 + 6) Piercing damage plus 11 (2d10) Lightning damage.

behir.actions.constrict.name: Constrict
behir.actions.constrict.text: Strength Saving Throw: DC 18, one Large or smaller creature the behir can see within 5 feet. Failure: 28 (5d8 + 6) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 16), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

behir.actions.lightning-breath.name: Lightning Breath
behir.actions.lightning-breath.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 16, each creature in a 90-foot-long, 5-foot-wide Line. Failure: 66 (12d10) Lightning damage. Success: Half damage.

behir.bonusActions.swallow.name: Swallow
behir.bonusActions.swallow.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 18, one Large or smaller creature Grappled by the behir (the behir can have only one creature swallowed at a time). Failure: The behir swallows the target, which is no longer Grappled. While swallowed, a creature has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, has Total Cover against attacks and other effects outside the behir, and takes 21 (6d6) Acid damage at the start of each of the behir's turns. If the behir takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from the swallowed creature, the behir must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the creature, which falls in a space within 10 feet of the behir and has the Prone condition. If the behir dies, a swallowed creature is no longer Restrained and can escape from the corpse by using 15 feet of movement, exiting Prone.

berserker.traits.bloodied-frenzy.name: Bloodied Frenzy
berserker.traits.bloodied-frenzy.text: While Bloodied, the berserker has Advantage on attack rolls and saving throws.

berserker.actions.greataxe.name: Greataxe
berserker.actions.greataxe.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (1d12 + 3) Slashing damage.

black-bear.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
black-bear.actions.multiattack.text: The bear makes two Rend attacks.

black-bear.actions.rend.name: Rend
black-bear.actions.rend.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Slashing damage.

black-dragon-wyrmling.traits.amphibious.name: Amphibious
black-dragon-wyrmling.traits.amphibious.text: The dragon can breathe air and water.

black-dragon-wyrmling.actions.multiattac.name: Multiattack
black-dragon-wyrmling.actions.multiattac.text: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

black-dragon-wyrmling.actions.rend.name: Rend
black-dragon-wyrmling.actions.rend.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Slashing damage plus 2 (1d4) Acid damage.

black-dragon-wyrmling.actions.acid-breat.name: Acid Breath
black-dragon-wyrmling.actions.acid-breat.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 15-foot-long, 5-foot-wide Line. Failure: 22 (5d8) Acid damage. Success: Half damage.

black-pudding.traits.amorphous.name: Amorphous
black-pudding.traits.amorphous.text: The pudding can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

black-pudding.traits.corrosive-form.name: Corrosive Form
black-pudding.traits.corrosive-form.text: A creature that hits the pudding with a melee attack roll takes 4 (1d8) Acid damage. Nonmagical ammunition is destroyed immediately after hitting the pudding and dealing any damage. Any nonmagical weapon takes a cumulative -1 penalty to attack rolls immediately after dealing damage to the pudding and coming into contact with it. The weapon is destroyed if the penalty reaches -5. The penalty can be removed by casting the Mending spell on the weapon. In 1 minute, the pudding can eat through 2 feet of nonmagical wood or metal.

black-pudding.traits.spider-climb.name: Spider Climb
black-pudding.traits.spider-climb.text: The pudding can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

black-pudding.actions.dissolving-pseudop.name: Dissolving Pseudopod
black-pudding.actions.dissolving-pseudop.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 10 ft. Hit: 17 (4d6 + 3) Acid damage. Nonmagical armor worn by the target takes a -1 penalty to the AC it offers. The armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10. The penalty can be removed by casting the Mending spell on the armor.

black-pudding.reactions.split.name: Split
black-pudding.reactions.split.text: Trigger: While the pudding is Large or Medium and has 10+ Hit Points, it becomes Bloodied or is subjected to Lightning or Slashing damage. Response: The pudding splits into two new Black Puddings. Each new pudding is one size smaller than the original pudding and acts on its Initiative. The original pudding's Hit Points are divided evenly between the new puddings (round down).

blink-dog.actions.bite.name: Bite
blink-dog.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage.

blink-dog.bonusActions.teleport.name: Teleport
blink-dog.bonusActions.teleport.text: The dog teleports up to 40 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

blood-hawk.traits.pack-tactics.name: Pack Tactics
blood-hawk.traits.pack-tactics.text: The hawk has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hawk's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

blood-hawk.actions.beak.name: Beak
blood-hawk.actions.beak.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage, or 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage if the target is Bloodied.

blue-dragon-wyrmling.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
blue-dragon-wyrmling.actions.multiattack.text: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

blue-dragon-wyrmling.actions.rend.name: Rend
blue-dragon-wyrmling.actions.rend.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Lightning damage.

blue-dragon-wyrmling.actions.lightning-b.name: Lightning Breath
blue-dragon-wyrmling.actions.lightning-b.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 30-foot-long, 5-foot-wide Line. Failure: 21 (6d6) Lightning damage. Success: Half damage.

boar.traits.bloodied-fury.name: Bloodied Fury
boar.traits.bloodied-fury.text: While Bloodied, the boar has Advantage on attack rolls.

boar.actions.gore.name: Gore
boar.actions.gore.text: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature and the boar moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 3 (1d6) Piercing damage and has the Prone condition.

bone-devil.traits.diabolical-restoration.name: Diabolical Restoration
bone-devil.traits.diabolical-restoration.text: If the devil dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

bone-devil.traits.magic-resistance.name: Magic Resistance
bone-devil.traits.magic-resistance.text: The devil has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

bone-devil.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
bone-devil.actions.multiattack.text: The devil makes two Claw attacks and one Infernal Sting attack.

bone-devil.actions.claw.name: Claw
bone-devil.actions.claw.text: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 10 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) Slashing damage.

bone-devil.actions.infernal-sting.name: Infernal Sting
bone-devil.actions.infernal-sting.text: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 10 ft. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) Piercing damage plus 18 (4d8) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the devil's next turn. While Poisoned, the target can't regain Hit Points.

brass-dragon-wyrmling.actions.rend.name: Rend
brass-dragon-wyrmling.actions.rend.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) Slashing damage.

brass-dragon-wyrmling.actions.fire-breat.name: Fire Breath
brass-dragon-wyrmling.actions.fire-breat.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 20-foot-long, 5-foot-wide Line. Failure: 14 (4d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

brass-dragon-wyrmling.actions.sleep-brea.name: Sleep Breath
brass-dragon-wyrmling.actions.sleep-brea.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: The target has the Incapacitated condition until the end of its next turn, at which point it repeats the save. Second Failure: The target has the Unconscious condition for 1 minute. This effect ends for the target if it takes damage or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it.

bronze-dragon-wyrmling.traits.amphibious.name: Amphibious
bronze-dragon-wyrmling.traits.amphibious.text: The dragon can breathe air and water.

bronze-dragon-wyrmling.actions.multiatta.name: Multiattack
bronze-dragon-wyrmling.actions.multiatta.text: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

bronze-dragon-wyrmling.actions.rend.name: Rend
bronze-dragon-wyrmling.actions.rend.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) Slashing damage.

bronze-dragon-wyrmling.actions.lightning.name: Lightning Breath
bronze-dragon-wyrmling.actions.lightning.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 40-foot-long, 5-foot-wide Line. Failure: 16 (3d10) Lightning damage. Success: Half damage.

bronze-dragon-wyrmling.actions.repulsion.name: Repulsion Breath
bronze-dragon-wyrmling.actions.repulsion.text: Strength Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. Failure: The target is pushed up to 30 feet straight away from the dragon and has the Prone condition.

brown-bear.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
brown-bear.actions.multiattack.text: The bear makes one Bite attack and one Claw attack.

brown-bear.actions.bite.name: Bite
brown-bear.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage.

brown-bear.actions.claw.name: Claw
brown-bear.actions.claw.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

bugbear-stalker.traits.abduct.name: Abduct
bugbear-stalker.traits.abduct.text: The bugbear needn't spend extra movement to move a creature it is grappling.

bugbear-stalker.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
bugbear-stalker.actions.multiattack.text: The bugbear makes two Javelin or Morningstar attacks.

bugbear-stalker.actions.javelin.name: Javelin
bugbear-stalker.actions.javelin.text: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +5, reach 10 ft. or range 30/120 ft. Hit: 13 (3d6 + 3) Piercing damage.

bugbear-stalker.actions.morningstar.name: Morningstar
bugbear-stalker.actions.morningstar.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5 (with Advantage if the target is Grappled by the bugbear), reach 10 ft. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) Piercing damage.

bugbear-stalker.bonusActions.quick-grapp.name: Quick Grapple
bugbear-stalker.bonusActions.quick-grapp.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 13, one Medium or smaller creature the bugbear can see within 10 feet. Failure: The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13).

bugbear-warrior.traits.abduct.name: Abduct
bugbear-warrior.traits.abduct.text: The bugbear needn't spend extra movement to move a creature it is grappling.

bugbear-warrior.actions.grab.name: Grab
bugbear-warrior.actions.grab.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 10 ft. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 12).

bugbear-warrior.actions.light-hammer.name: Light Hammer
bugbear-warrior.actions.light-hammer.text: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +4 (with Advantage if the target is Grappled by the bugbear), reach 10 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 9 (3d4 + 2) Bludgeoning damage.

bulette.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
bulette.actions.multiattack.text: The bulette makes two Bite attacks.

bulette.actions.bite.name: Bite
bulette.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 17 (2d12 + 4) Piercing damage.

bulette.actions.deadly-leap.name: Deadly Leap
bulette.actions.deadly-leap.text: The bulette spends 5 feet of movement to jump to a space within 15 feet that contains one or more Large or smaller creatures. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 15, each creature in the bulette's destination space. Failure: 19 (3d12) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Prone condition. Success: Half damage, and the target is pushed 5 feet straight away from the bulette.

bulette.bonusActions.leap.name: Leap
bulette.bonusActions.leap.text: The bulette jumps up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.

camel.actions.bite.name: Bite
camel.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Bludgeoning damage.

cat.traits.jumper.name: Jumper
cat.traits.jumper.text: The cat's jump distance is determined using its Dexterity rather than its Strength.

cat.actions.scratch.name: Scratch
cat.actions.scratch.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Slashing damage.

centaur-trooper.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
centaur-trooper.actions.multiattack.text: The centaur makes two attacks, using Pike or Longbow in any combination.

centaur-trooper.actions.pike.name: Pike
centaur-trooper.actions.pike.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) Piercing damage.

centaur-trooper.actions.longbow.name: Longbow
centaur-trooper.actions.longbow.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +4, range 150/600 ft. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage.

centaur-trooper.bonusActions.trampling-c.name: Trampling Charge
centaur-trooper.bonusActions.trampling-c.text: The centaur moves up to its Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks and can move through the spaces of Medium or smaller creatures. Each creature whose space the centaur enters is targeted once by the following effect. Strength Saving Throw: DC 14. Failure: 7 (1d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Prone condition.

chain-devil.traits.diabolical-restoratio.name: Diabolical Restoration
chain-devil.traits.diabolical-restoratio.text: If the devil dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

chain-devil.traits.magic-resistance.name: Magic Resistance
chain-devil.traits.magic-resistance.text: The devil has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

chain-devil.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
chain-devil.actions.multiattack.text: The devil makes two Chain attacks and uses Conjure Infernal Chain.

chain-devil.actions.chain.name: Chain
chain-devil.actions.chain.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 10 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from one of two chains, and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

chain-devil.actions.conjure-infernal-cha.name: Conjure Infernal Chain
chain-devil.actions.conjure-infernal-cha.text: The devil conjures a fiery chain to bind a creature. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 15, one creature the devil can see within 60 feet. Failure: 9 (2d4 + 4) Fire damage, and the target has the Restrained condition until the end of the devil's next turn, at which point the chain disappears. If the target is Large or smaller, the devil moves the target up to 30 feet straight toward itself. Success: The chain disappears.

chain-devil.reactions.unnerving-gaze.name: Unnerving Gaze
chain-devil.reactions.unnerving-gaze.text: Trigger: A creature the devil can see starts its turn within 30 feet of the devil and can see the devil. Response: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 15, the triggering creature. Failure: The target has the Frightened condition until the end of its turn. Success: The target is immune to this devil's Unnerving Gaze for 24 hours.

chimera.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
chimera.actions.multiattack.text: The chimera makes one Ram attack, one Bite attack, and one Claw attack. It can replace the Claw attack with a use of Fire Breath if available.

chimera.actions.bite.name: Bite
chimera.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage, or 18 (4d6 + 4) Piercing damage if the chimera had Advantage on the attack roll.

chimera.actions.claw.name: Claw
chimera.actions.claw.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) Slashing damage.

chimera.actions.ram.name: Ram
chimera.actions.ram.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (1d12 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

chimera.actions.fire-breath.name: Fire Breath
chimera.actions.fire-breath.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 15, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 31 (7d8) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

chuul.traits.amphibious.name: Amphibious
chuul.traits.amphibious.text: The chuul can breathe air and water.

chuul.traits.sense-magic.name: Sense Magic
chuul.traits.sense-magic.text: The chuul senses magic within 120 feet of itself. This trait otherwise works like the Detect Magic spell but isn't itself magical.

chuul.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
chuul.actions.multiattack.text: The chuul makes two Pincer attacks and uses Paralyzing Tentacles.

chuul.actions.pincer.name: Pincer
chuul.actions.pincer.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from one of two pincers.

chuul.actions.paralyzing-tentacles.name: Paralyzing Tentacles
chuul.actions.paralyzing-tentacles.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 13, one creature Grappled by the chuul. Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. While Poisoned, the target has the Paralyzed condition.

clay-golem.traits.acid-absorption.name: Acid Absorption
clay-golem.traits.acid-absorption.text: Whenever the golem is subjected to Acid damage, it takes no damage and instead regains a number of Hit Points equal to the Acid damage dealt.

clay-golem.traits.berserk.name: Berserk
clay-golem.traits.berserk.text: Whenever the golem starts its turn Bloodied, roll 1d6. On a 6, the golem goes berserk. On each of its turns while berserk, the golem attacks the nearest creature it can see. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack, the golem attacks an object. Once the golem goes berserk, it continues to be berserk until it is destroyed or it is no longer Bloodied.

clay-golem.traits.magic-resistance.name: Magic Resistance
clay-golem.traits.magic-resistance.text: The golem has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

clay-golem.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
clay-golem.actions.multiattack.text: The golem makes two Slam attacks, or it makes three Slam attacks if it used Hasten this turn.

clay-golem.actions.slam.name: Slam
clay-golem.actions.slam.text: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) Bludgeoning damage plus 6 (1d12) Acid damage, and the target's Hit Point maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Acid damage taken.

clay-golem.bonusActions.hasten.name: Hasten
clay-golem.bonusActions.hasten.text: The golem takes the Dash and Disengage actions.

cloaker.traits.light-sensitivity.name: Light Sensitivity
cloaker.traits.light-sensitivity.text: While in Bright Light, the cloaker has Disadvantage on attack rolls.

cloaker.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
cloaker.actions.multiattack.text: The cloaker makes one Attach attack and two Tail attacks.

cloaker.actions.attach.name: Attach
cloaker.actions.attach.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 13 (3d6 + 3) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, the cloaker attaches to it. While the cloaker is attached, the target has the Blinded condition, and the cloaker can't make Attach attacks against other targets. In addition, the cloaker halves the damage it takes (round down), and the target takes the same amount of damage. The cloaker can detach itself by spending 5 feet of movement. The target or a creature within 5 feet of it can take an action to try to detach the cloaker, doing so by succeeding on a DC 14 Strength (Athletics) check.

cloaker.actions.tail.name: Tail
cloaker.actions.tail.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) Slashing damage.

cloaker.bonusActions.moan.name: Moan
cloaker.bonusActions.moan.text: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature in a 60-foot Emanation originating from the cloaker. Failure: The target has the Frightened condition until the end of the cloaker's next turn. Success: The target is immune to this cloaker's Moan for the next 24 hours.

cloaker.bonusActions.phantasms.name: Phantasms
cloaker.bonusActions.phantasms.text: The cloaker casts the Mirror Image spell, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability. The spell ends early if the cloaker starts or ends its turn in Bright Light.

cloud-giant.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
cloud-giant.actions.multiattack.text: The giant makes two attacks, using Thunderous Mace or Thundercloud in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting to cast Fog Cloud.

cloud-giant.actions.thunderous-mace.name: Thunderous Mace
cloud-giant.actions.thunderous-mace.text: Melee Attack Roll: +12, reach 10 ft. Hit: 21 (3d8 + 8) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) Thunder damage.

cloud-giant.actions.thundercloud.name: Thundercloud
cloud-giant.actions.thundercloud.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +12, range 240 ft. Hit: 18 (3d6 + 8) Thunder damage, and the target has the Incapacitated condition until the end of its next turn.

cloud-giant.actions.spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
cloud-giant.actions.spellcasting.text: The giant casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15): At Will: Detect Magic, Fog Cloud, Light. 1/Day Each: Control Weather, Gaseous Form, Telekinesis.

cloud-giant.bonusActions.misty-step.name: Misty Step
cloud-giant.bonusActions.misty-step.text: The giant casts the Misty Step spell, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

cockatrice.actions.petrifying-bite.name: Petrifying Bite
cockatrice.actions.petrifying-bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) Piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 11. First Failure: The target has the Restrained condition. The target repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still Restrained, ending the effect on itself on a success. Second Failure: The target has the Petrified condition, instead of the Restrained condition, for 24 hours.

commoner.traits.training.name: Training
commoner.traits.training.text: The commoner has proficiency in one skill of the GM's choice and has Advantage whenever it makes an ability check using that skill.

commoner.actions.club.name: Club
commoner.actions.club.text: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 2 (1d4) Bludgeoning damage.

constrictor-snake.actions.bite.name: Bite
constrictor-snake.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage.

constrictor-snake.actions.constrict.name: Constrict
constrictor-snake.actions.constrict.text: Strength Saving Throw: DC 12, one Medium or smaller creature the snake can see within 5 feet. Failure: 7 (3d4) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 12).

copper-dragon-wyrmling.actions.rend.name: Rend
copper-dragon-wyrmling.actions.rend.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) Slashing damage.

copper-dragon-wyrmling.actions.acid-brea.name: Acid Breath
copper-dragon-wyrmling.actions.acid-brea.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 20-foot-long, 5-foot-wide Line. Failure: 18 (4d8) Acid damage. Success: Half damage.

copper-dragon-wyrmling.actions.slowing-b.name: Slowing Breath
copper-dragon-wyrmling.actions.slowing-b.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: The target can't take Reactions; its Speed is halved; and it can take either an action or a Bonus Action on its turn, not both. This effect lasts until the end of its next turn.

couatl.traits.shielded-mind.name: Shielded Mind
couatl.traits.shielded-mind.text: The couatl's thoughts can't be read by any means, and other creatures can communicate with it telepathically only if it allows them.

couatl.actions.bite.name: Bite
couatl.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (1d12 + 5) Piercing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of the couatl's next turn.

couatl.actions.constrict.name: Constrict
couatl.actions.constrict.text: Strength Saving Throw: DC 15, one Medium or smaller creature the couatl can see within 5 feet. Failure: 8 (1d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

couatl.actions.spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
couatl.actions.spellcasting.text: The couatl casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15): At Will: Detect Evil and Good, Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Shapechange (Beast or Humanoid form only, no Temporary Hit Points gained from the spell, and no Concentration or Temporary Hit Points required to maintain the spell). 1/Day Each: Create Food and Water, Dream, Greater Restoration, Scrying, Sleep.

couatl.bonusActions.divine-aid.name: Divine Aid
couatl.bonusActions.divine-aid.text: The couatl casts Bless, Lesser Restoration, or Sanctuary, requiring no spell components and using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

crab.traits.amphibious.name: Amphibious
crab.traits.amphibious.text: The crab can breathe air and water.

crab.actions.claw.name: Claw
crab.actions.claw.text: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Bludgeoning damage.

crocodile.traits.hold-breath.name: Hold Breath
crocodile.traits.hold-breath.text: The crocodile can hold its breath for 1 hour.

crocodile.actions.bite.name: Bite
crocodile.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 12). While Grappled, the target has the Restrained condition.

cultist.actions.ritual-sickle.name: Ritual Sickle
cultist.actions.ritual-sickle.text: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) Slashing damage plus 1 Necrotic damage.

cultist-fanatic.actions.pact-blade.name: Pact Blade
cultist-fanatic.actions.pact-blade.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage.

cultist-fanatic.actions.spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
cultist-fanatic.actions.spellcasting.text: The cultist casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12, +4 to hit with spell attacks): At Will: Light, Thaumaturgy. 2/Day: Command. 1/Day: Hold Person.

cultist-fanatic.bonusActions.spiritual-w.name: Spiritual Weapon
cultist-fanatic.bonusActions.spiritual-w.text: The cultist casts the Spiritual Weapon spell, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

darkmantle.actions.crush.name: Crush
darkmantle.actions.crush.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage, and the darkmantle attaches to the target. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature and the darkmantle had Advantage on the attack roll, it covers the target, which has the Blinded condition and is suffocating while the darkmantle is attached in this way. While attached to a target, the darkmantle can attack only the target but has Advantage on its attack rolls. Its Speed becomes 0, it can't benefit from any bonus to its Speed, and it moves with the target. A creature can take an action to try to detach the darkmantle from itself, doing so with a successful DC 13 Strength (Athletics) check. On its turn, the darkmantle can detach itself by using 5 feet of movement.

darkmantle.actions.darkness-aura.name: Darkness Aura
darkmantle.actions.darkness-aura.text: (1/Day) Magical Darkness fills a 15-foot Emanation originating from the darkmantle. This effect lasts while the darkmantle maintains Concentration on it, up to 10 minutes. Darkvision can't penetrate this area, and no light can illuminate it.

death-dog.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
death-dog.actions.multiattack.text: The death dog makes two Bite attacks.

death-dog.actions.bite.name: Bite
death-dog.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it is subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12. First Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition. While Poisoned, the target's Hit Point maximum doesn't return to normal when finishing a Long Rest, and it repeats the save every 24 hours that elapse, ending the effect on itself on a success. Subsequent Failures: The Poisoned target's Hit Point maximum decreases by 5 (1d10).

deer.traits.agile.name: Agile
deer.traits.agile.text: The deer doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it moves out of an enemy's reach.

deer.actions.ram.name: Ram
deer.actions.ram.text: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 2 (1d4) Bludgeoning damage.

deva.traits.exalted-restoration.name: Exalted Restoration
deva.traits.exalted-restoration.text: If the deva dies outside Mount Celestia, its body disappears, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in Mount Celestia.

deva.traits.magic-resistance.name: Magic Resistance
deva.traits.magic-resistance.text: The deva has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

deva.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
deva.actions.multiattack.text: The deva makes two Holy Mace attacks.

deva.actions.holy-mace.name: Holy Mace
deva.actions.holy-mace.text: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) Radiant damage.

deva.actions.spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
deva.actions.spellcasting.text: The deva casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17): At Will: Detect Evil and Good, Shapechange (Beast or Humanoid form only, no Temporary Hit Points gained from the spell, and no Concentration or Temporary Hit Points required to maintain the spell). 1/Day Each: Commune, Raise Dead.

deva.bonusActions.divine-aid.name: Divine Aid
deva.bonusActions.divine-aid.text: The deva casts Cure Wounds, Lesser Restoration, or Remove Curse, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

dire-wolf.traits.pack-tactics.name: Pack Tactics
dire-wolf.traits.pack-tactics.text: The wolf has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the wolf's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

dire-wolf.actions.bite.name: Bite
dire-wolf.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

djinni.traits.elemental-restoration.name: Elemental Restoration
djinni.traits.elemental-restoration.text: If the djinni dies outside the Elemental Plane of Air, its body dissolves into mist, and it gains a new body in 1d4 days, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere on the Plane of Air.

djinni.traits.magic-resistance.name: Magic Resistance
djinni.traits.magic-resistance.text: The djinni has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

djinni.traits.wishes.name: Wishes
djinni.traits.wishes.text: The djinni has a 30 percent chance of knowing the Wish spell. If the djinni knows it, the djinni can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way the djinni can understand. If the djinni casts the spell for the creature, the djinni suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the djinni has cast it three times, the djinni can't do so again for 365 days.

djinni.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
djinni.actions.multiattack.text: The djinni makes three attacks, using Storm Blade or Storm Bolt in any combination.

djinni.actions.storm-blade.name: Storm Blade
djinni.actions.storm-blade.text: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 feet. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Lightning damage.

djinni.actions.storm-bolt.name: Storm Bolt
djinni.actions.storm-bolt.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +9, range 120 feet. Hit: 13 (3d8) Thunder damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

djinni.actions.create-whirlwind.name: Create Whirlwind
djinni.actions.create-whirlwind.text: The djinni conjures a whirlwind at a point it can see within 120 feet. The whirlwind fills a 20-foot-radius, 60-foot-high Cylinder centered on that point. The whirlwind lasts until the djinni's Concentration on it ends. The djinni can move the whirlwind up to 20 feet at the start of each of its turns. Whenever the whirlwind enters a creature's space or a creature enters the whirlwind, that creature is subjected to the following effect. Strength Saving Throw: DC 17 (a creature makes this save only once per turn, and the djinni is unaffected). Failure: While in the whirlwind, the target has the Restrained condition and moves with the whirlwind. At the start of each of its turns, the Restrained target takes 21 (6d6) Thunder damage. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success.

djinni.actions.spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
djinni.actions.spellcasting.text: The djinni casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17): At Will: Detect Evil and Good, Detect Magic. 2/Day Each: Create Food and Water (can create wine instead of water), Tongues, Wind Walk. 1/Day Each: Creation, Gaseous Form, Invisibility, Major Image, Plane Shift.

doppelganger.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
doppelganger.actions.multiattack.text: The doppelganger makes two Slam attacks and uses Unsettling Visage if available.

doppelganger.actions.slam.name: Slam
doppelganger.actions.slam.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6 (with Advantage during the first round of each combat), reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage.

doppelganger.actions.read-thoughts.name: Read Thoughts
doppelganger.actions.read-thoughts.text: The doppelganger casts Detect Thoughts, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12).

doppelganger.actions.unsettling-visage.name: Unsettling Visage
doppelganger.actions.unsettling-visage.text: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 15-foot Emanation originating from the doppelganger that can see the doppelganger. Failure: The target has the Frightened condition and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

doppelganger.bonusActions.shape-shift.name: Shape-Shift
doppelganger.bonusActions.shape-shift.text: The doppelganger shape-shifts into a Medium or Small Humanoid, or it returns to its true form. Its game statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

draft-horse.actions.hooves.name: Hooves
draft-horse.actions.hooves.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) Bludgeoning damage.

dragon-turtle.traits.amphibious.name: Amphibious
dragon-turtle.traits.amphibious.text: The dragon can breathe air and water.

dragon-turtle.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
dragon-turtle.actions.multiattack.text: The dragon makes three Bite attacks. It can replace one attack with a Tail attack.

dragon-turtle.actions.bite.name: Bite
dragon-turtle.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +13, reach 15 ft. Hit: 23 (3d10 + 7) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Fire damage. Being underwater doesn't grant Resistance to this Fire damage.

dragon-turtle.actions.tail.name: Tail
dragon-turtle.actions.tail.text: Melee Attack Roll: +13, reach 15 ft. Hit: 18 (2d10 + 7) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

dragon-turtle.actions.steam-breath.name: Steam Breath
dragon-turtle.actions.steam-breath.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 19, each creature in a 60-foot Cone. Failure: 56 (16d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage. Failure or Success: Being underwater doesn't grant Resistance to this Fire damage.

dretch.actions.rend.name: Rend
dretch.actions.rend.text: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) Slashing damage.

dretch.actions.fetid-cloud.name: Fetid Cloud
dretch.actions.fetid-cloud.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the dretch. Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn. While Poisoned, the creature can take either an action or a Bonus Action on its turn, not both, and it can't take Reactions.

drider.traits.spider-climb.name: Spider Climb
drider.traits.spider-climb.text: The drider can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

drider.traits.sunlight-sensitivity.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
drider.traits.sunlight-sensitivity.text: While in sunlight, the drider has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

drider.traits.web-walker.name: Web Walker
drider.traits.web-walker.text: The drider ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and the drider knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

drider.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
drider.actions.multiattack.text: The drider makes three attacks, using Foreleg or Poison Burst in any combination.

drider.actions.foreleg.name: Foreleg
drider.actions.foreleg.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 10 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) Piercing damage.

drider.actions.poison-burst.name: Poison Burst
drider.actions.poison-burst.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +6, range 120 ft. Hit: 13 (3d6 + 3) Poison damage.

drider.bonusActions.magic-of-the-spider-.name: Magic of the Spider Queen
drider.bonusActions.magic-of-the-spider-.text: The drider casts Darkness, Faerie Fire, or Web, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14).

druid.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
druid.actions.multiattack.text: The druid makes two attacks, using Vine Staff or Verdant Wisp in any combination.

druid.actions.vine-staff.name: Vine Staff
druid.actions.vine-staff.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 2 (1d4) Poison damage.

druid.actions.verdant-wisp.name: Verdant Wisp
druid.actions.verdant-wisp.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 90 ft. Hit: 10 (3d6) Radiant damage.

druid.actions.spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
druid.actions.spellcasting.text: The druid casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13): At Will: Druidcraft, Speak with Animals. 2/Day Each: Entangle, Thunderwave. 1/Day Each: Animal Messenger, Longstrider, Moonbeam.

dryad.traits.magic-resistance.name: Magic Resistance
dryad.traits.magic-resistance.text: The dryad has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

dryad.traits.speak-with-beasts-and-plant.name: Speak with Beasts and Plants
dryad.traits.speak-with-beasts-and-plant.text: The dryad can communicate with Beasts and Plants as if they shared a language.

dryad.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
dryad.actions.multiattack.text: The dryad makes one Vine Lash or Thorn Burst attack, and it can use Spellcasting to cast Charm Monster.

dryad.actions.vine-lash.name: Vine Lash
dryad.actions.vine-lash.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Slashing damage.

dryad.actions.thorn-burst.name: Thorn Burst
dryad.actions.thorn-burst.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +6, range 60 ft. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

dryad.actions.spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
dryad.actions.spellcasting.text: The dryad casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14): At Will: Animal Friendship, Charm Monster (lasts 24 hours; ends early if the dryad casts the spell again), Druidcraft. 1/Day Each: Entangle, Pass without Trace.

dryad.bonusActions.tree-stride.name: Tree Stride
dryad.bonusActions.tree-stride.text: If within 5 feet of a Large or bigger tree, the dryad teleports to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of a second Large or bigger tree that is within 60 feet of the previous tree.

dust-mephit.traits.death-burst.name: Death Burst
dust-mephit.traits.death-burst.text: The mephit explodes when it dies. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 10, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the mephit. Failure: 5 (2d4) Bludgeoning damage. Success: Half damage.

dust-mephit.actions.claw.name: Claw
dust-mephit.actions.claw.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Slashing damage.

dust-mephit.actions.blinding-breath.name: Blinding Breath
dust-mephit.actions.blinding-breath.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 10, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: The target has the Blinded condition until the end of the mephit's next turn.

dust-mephit.actions.sleep.name: Sleep
dust-mephit.actions.sleep.text: The mephit casts the Sleep spell, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 10).

eagle.actions.talons.name: Talons
eagle.actions.talons.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 feet. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Slashing damage.

earth-elemental.traits.earth-glide.name: Earth Glide
earth-elemental.traits.earth-glide.text: The elemental can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the elemental doesn't disturb the material it moves through.

earth-elemental.traits.siege-monster.name: Siege Monster
earth-elemental.traits.siege-monster.text: The elemental deals double damage to objects and structures.

earth-elemental.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
earth-elemental.actions.multiattack.text: The elemental makes two attacks, using Slam or Rock Launch in any combination.

earth-elemental.actions.slam.name: Slam
earth-elemental.actions.slam.text: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 10 ft. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) Bludgeoning damage.

earth-elemental.actions.rock-launch.name: Rock Launch
earth-elemental.actions.rock-launch.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +8, range 60 ft. Hit: 8 (1d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

efreeti.traits.elemental-restoration.name: Elemental Restoration
efreeti.traits.elemental-restoration.text: If the efreeti dies outside the Elemental Plane of Fire, its body dissolves into ash, and it gains a new body in 1d4 days, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere on the Plane of Fire.

efreeti.traits.magic-resistance.name: Magic Resistance
efreeti.traits.magic-resistance.text: The efreeti has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

efreeti.traits.wishes.name: Wishes
efreeti.traits.wishes.text: The efreeti has a 30 percent chance of knowing the Wish spell. If the efreeti knows it, the efreeti can cast it only on behalf of a non-genie creature who communicates a wish in a way the efreeti can understand. If the efreeti casts the spell for the creature, the efreeti suffers none of the spell's stress. Once the efreeti has cast it three times, the efreeti can't do so again for 365 days.

efreeti.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
efreeti.actions.multiattack.text: The efreeti makes three attacks, using Heated Blade or Hurl Flame in any combination.

efreeti.actions.heated-blade.name: Heated Blade
efreeti.actions.heated-blade.text: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 5 ft. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) Slashing damage plus 13 (2d12) Fire damage.

efreeti.actions.hurl-flame.name: Hurl Flame
efreeti.actions.hurl-flame.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +8, range 120 ft. Hit: 24 (7d6) Fire damage.

efreeti.actions.spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
efreeti.actions.spellcasting.text: The efreeti casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16): At Will: Detect Magic, Elementalism. 1/Day Each: Gaseous Form, Invisibility, Major Image, Plane Shift, Tongues, Wall of Fire (level 7 version).

elephant.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
elephant.actions.multiattack.text: The elephant makes two Gore attacks.

elephant.actions.gore.name: Gore
elephant.actions.gore.text: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 5 ft. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) Piercing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature and the elephant moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the Prone condition.

elephant.bonusActions.trample.name: Trample
elephant.bonusActions.trample.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 16, one creature within 5 feet that has the Prone condition. Failure: 17 (2d10 + 6) Bludgeoning damage. Success: Half damage.

elk.actions.ram.name: Ram
elk.actions.ram.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the elk moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 3 (1d6) Bludgeoning damage and has the Prone condition.

erinyes.traits.diabolical-restoration.name: Diabolical Restoration
erinyes.traits.diabolical-restoration.text: If the erinyes dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

erinyes.traits.magic-resistance.name: Magic Resistance
erinyes.traits.magic-resistance.text: The erinyes has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

erinyes.traits.magic-rope.name: Magic Rope
erinyes.traits.magic-rope.text: The erinyes has a magic rope. While bearing it, the erinyes can use the Entangling Rope action. The rope has AC 20, HP 90, and Immunity to Poison and Psychic damage. The rope turns to dust if reduced to 0 Hit Points, if it is 5+ feet away from the erinyes for 1 hour or more, or if the erinyes dies. If the rope is damaged or destroyed, the erinyes can fully restore it when finishing a Short or Long Rest.

erinyes.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
erinyes.actions.multiattack.text: The erinyes makes three Withering Sword attacks and can use Entangling Rope.

erinyes.actions.withering-sword.name: Withering Sword
erinyes.actions.withering-sword.text: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 5 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) Slashing damage plus 11 (2d10) Necrotic damage.

erinyes.actions.entangling-rope.name: Entangling Rope
erinyes.actions.entangling-rope.text: (Requires Magic Rope) Strength Saving Throw: DC 16, one creature the erinyes can see within 120 feet. Failure: 14 (4d6) Force damage, and the target has the Restrained condition until the rope is destroyed, the erinyes uses a Bonus Action to release the target, or the erinyes uses Entangling Rope again.

erinyes.reactions.parry.name: Parry
erinyes.reactions.parry.text: Trigger: The erinyes is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. Response: The erinyes adds 4 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

ettercap.traits.spider-climb.name: Spider Climb
ettercap.traits.spider-climb.text: The ettercap can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

ettercap.traits.web-walker.name: Web Walker
ettercap.traits.web-walker.text: The ettercap ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and the ettercap knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

ettercap.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
ettercap.actions.multiattack.text: The ettercap makes one Bite attack and one Claw attack.

ettercap.actions.bite.name: Bite
ettercap.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the ettercap's next turn.

ettercap.actions.claw.name: Claw
ettercap.actions.claw.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) Slashing damage.

ettercap.actions.web-strand.name: Web Strand
ettercap.actions.web-strand.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 12, one Large or smaller creature the ettercap can see within 30 feet. Failure: The target has the Restrained condition until the web is destroyed (AC 10; HP 5; Vulnerability to Fire damage; Immunity to Bludgeoning, Poison, and Psychic damage).

ettercap.bonusActions.reel.name: Reel
ettercap.bonusActions.reel.text: The ettercap pulls one creature within 30 feet of itself that is Restrained by its Web Strand up to 25 feet straight toward itself.

ettin.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
ettin.actions.multiattack.text: The ettin makes one Battleaxe attack and one Morningstar attack.

ettin.actions.battleaxe.name: Battleaxe
ettin.actions.battleaxe.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

ettin.actions.morningstar.name: Morningstar
ettin.actions.morningstar.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) Piercing damage, and the target has Disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn.

fire-elemental.traits.fire-aura.name: Fire Aura
fire-elemental.traits.fire-aura.text: At the end of each of the elemental's turns, each creature in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the elemental takes 5 (1d10) Fire damage. Creatures and flammable objects in the Emanation start burning.

fire-elemental.traits.fire-form.name: Fire Form
fire-elemental.traits.fire-form.text: The elemental can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so, and it can enter a creature's space and stop there. The first time it enters a creature's space on a turn, that creature takes 5 (1d10) Fire damage.

fire-elemental.traits.illumination.name: Illumination
fire-elemental.traits.illumination.text: The elemental sheds Bright Light in a 30-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet.

fire-elemental.traits.water-susceptibili.name: Water Susceptibility
fire-elemental.traits.water-susceptibili.text: The elemental takes 3 (1d6) Cold damage for every 5 feet the elemental moves in water or for every gallon of water splashed on it.

fire-elemental.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
fire-elemental.actions.multiattack.text: The elemental makes two Burn attacks.

fire-elemental.actions.burn.name: Burn
fire-elemental.actions.burn.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Fire damage. If the target is a creature or a flammable object, it starts burning.

fire-giant.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
fire-giant.actions.multiattack.text: The giant makes two attacks, using Flame Sword or Hammer Throw in any combination.

fire-giant.actions.flame-sword.name: Flame Sword
fire-giant.actions.flame-sword.text: Melee Attack Roll: +11, reach 10 ft. Hit: 21 (4d6 + 7) Slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) Fire damage.

fire-giant.actions.hammer-throw.name: Hammer Throw
fire-giant.actions.hammer-throw.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +11, range 60/240 ft. Hit: 23 (3d10 + 7) Bludgeoning damage plus 4 (1d8) Fire damage, and the target is pushed up to 15 feet straight away from the giant and has Disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn.

flesh-golem.traits.aversion-to-fire.name: Aversion to Fire
flesh-golem.traits.aversion-to-fire.text: If the golem takes Fire damage, it has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until the end of its next turn.

flesh-golem.traits.berserk.name: Berserk
flesh-golem.traits.berserk.text: Whenever the golem starts its turn Bloodied, roll 1d6. On a 6, the golem goes berserk. On each of its turns while berserk, the golem attacks the nearest creature it can see. If no creature is near enough to move to and attack, the golem attacks an object. Once the golem goes berserk, it remains so until it is destroyed or it is no longer Bloodied. The golem's creator, if within 60 feet of the berserk golem, can try to calm it by taking an action to make a DC 15 Charisma (Persuasion) check; the golem must be able to hear its creator. If this check succeeds, the golem ceases being berserk until the start of its next turn, at which point it resumes rolling for the Berserk trait again if it is still Bloodied.

flesh-golem.traits.lightning-absorption.name: Lightning Absorption
flesh-golem.traits.lightning-absorption.text: Whenever the golem is subjected to Lightning damage, it regains a number of Hit Points equal to the Lightning damage dealt.

flesh-golem.traits.magic-resistance.name: Magic Resistance
flesh-golem.traits.magic-resistance.text: The golem has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

flesh-golem.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
flesh-golem.actions.multiattack.text: The golem makes two Slam attacks.

flesh-golem.actions.slam.name: Slam
flesh-golem.actions.slam.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 4 (1d8) Lightning damage.

flying-snake.traits.flyby.name: Flyby
flying-snake.traits.flyby.text: The snake doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

flying-snake.actions.bite.name: Bite
flying-snake.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) Poison damage.

frog.traits.amphibious.name: Amphibious
frog.traits.amphibious.text: The frog can breathe air and water.

frog.traits.standing-leap.name: Standing Leap
frog.traits.standing-leap.text: The frog's Long Jump is up to 10 feet and its High Jump is up to 5 feet with or without a running start.

frog.actions.bite.name: Bite
frog.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

frost-giant.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
frost-giant.actions.multiattack.text: The giant makes two attacks, using Frost Axe or Great Bow in any combination.

frost-giant.actions.frost-axe.name: Frost Axe
frost-giant.actions.frost-axe.text: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 10 ft. Hit: 19 (2d12 + 6) Slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) Cold damage.

frost-giant.actions.great-bow.name: Great Bow
frost-giant.actions.great-bow.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +9, range 150/600 ft. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Cold damage, and the target's Speed decreases by 10 feet until the end of its next turn.

frost-giant.bonusActions.war-cry.name: War Cry
frost-giant.bonusActions.war-cry.text: The giant or one creature of its choice that can see or hear it gains 16 (2d10 + 5) Temporary Hit Points and has Advantage on attack rolls until the start of the giant's next turn.

gargoyle.traits.flyby.name: Flyby
gargoyle.traits.flyby.text: The gargoyle doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

gargoyle.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
gargoyle.actions.multiattack.text: The gargoyle makes two Claw attacks.

gargoyle.actions.claw.name: Claw
gargoyle.actions.claw.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) Slashing damage.

gelatinous-cube.traits.ooze-cube.name: Ooze Cube
gelatinous-cube.traits.ooze-cube.text: The cube fills its entire space and is transparent. Other creatures can enter that space, but a creature that does so is subjected to the cube's Engulf and has Disadvantage on the saving throw. Creatures inside the cube have Total Cover, and the cube can hold one Large creature or up to four Medium or Small creatures inside itself at a time. As an action, a creature within 5 feet of the cube can pull a creature or an object out of the cube by succeeding on a DC 12 Strength (Athletics) check, and the puller takes 10 (3d6) Acid damage.

gelatinous-cube.traits.transparent.name: Transparent
gelatinous-cube.traits.transparent.text: Even when the cube is in plain sight, a creature must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom (Perception) check to notice the cube if the creature hasn't witnessed the cube move or otherwise act.

gelatinous-cube.actions.pseudopod.name: Pseudopod
gelatinous-cube.actions.pseudopod.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 12 (3d6 + 2) Acid damage.

gelatinous-cube.actions.engulf.name: Engulf
gelatinous-cube.actions.engulf.text: The cube moves up to its Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks. The cube can move through the spaces of Large or smaller creatures if it has room inside itself to contain them (see the Ooze Cube trait). Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature whose space the cube enters for the first time during this move. Failure: 10 (3d6) Acid damage, and the target is engulfed. An engulfed target is suffocating, can't cast spells with a Verbal component, has the Restrained condition, and takes 10 (3d6) Acid damage at the start of each of the cube's turns. When the cube moves, the engulfed target moves with it. An engulfed target can try to escape by taking an action to make a DC 12 Strength (Athletics) check. On a successful check, the target escapes and enters the nearest unoccupied space. Success: Half damage, and the target moves to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the cube. If there is no unoccupied space, the target fails the save instead.

ghast.traits.stench.name: Stench
ghast.traits.stench.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 10, any creature that starts its turn in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the ghast. Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition until the start of its next turn. Success: The target is immune to this ghast's Stench for 24 hours.

ghast.actions.bite.name: Bite
ghast.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) Necrotic damage.

ghast.actions.claw.name: Claw
ghast.actions.claw.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage. If the target is a non-Undead creature, it is subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 10. Failure: The target has the Paralyzed condition until the end of its next turn.

ghost.traits.ethereal-sight.name: Ethereal Sight
ghost.traits.ethereal-sight.text: The ghost can see 60 feet into the Ethereal Plane when it is on the Material Plane.

ghost.traits.incorporeal-movement.name: Incorporeal Movement
ghost.traits.incorporeal-movement.text: The ghost can move through other creatures and objects as if they were Difficult Terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

ghost.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
ghost.actions.multiattack.text: The ghost makes two Withering Touch attacks.

ghost.actions.withering-touch.name: Withering Touch
ghost.actions.withering-touch.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 19 (3d10 + 3) Necrotic damage.

ghost.actions.etherealness.name: Etherealness
ghost.actions.etherealness.text: The ghost casts the Etherealness spell, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability. The ghost is visible on the Material Plane while on the Border Ethereal and vice versa, but it can't affect or be affected by anything on the other plane.

ghost.actions.horrific-visage.name: Horrific Visage
ghost.actions.horrific-visage.text: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature in a 60-foot Cone that can see the ghost and isn't an Undead. Failure: 10 (2d6 + 3) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the start of the ghost's next turn. Success: The target is immune to this ghost's Horrific Visage for 24 hours.

ghost.actions.possession.name: Possession
ghost.actions.possession.text: Charisma Saving Throw: DC 13, one Humanoid the ghost can see within 5 feet. Failure: The target is possessed by the ghost; the ghost disappears, and the target has the Incapacitated condition and loses control of its body. The ghost now controls the body, but the target retains awareness. The ghost can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, except ones that specifically target Undead. The ghost's game statistics are the same, except it uses the possessed target's Speed, as well as the target's Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution modifiers. The possession lasts until the body drops to 0 Hit Points or the ghost leaves as a Bonus Action. When the possession ends, the ghost appears in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the target, and the target is immune to this ghost's Possession for 24 hours. Success: The target is immune to this ghost's Possession for 24 hours.

ghoul.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
ghoul.actions.multiattack.text: The ghoul makes two Bite attacks.

ghoul.actions.bite.name: Bite
ghoul.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Necrotic damage.

ghoul.actions.claw.name: Claw
ghoul.actions.claw.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Slashing damage. If the target is a creature that isn't an Undead or elf, it is subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 10. Failure: The target has the Paralyzed condition until the end of its next turn.

giant-ape.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
giant-ape.actions.multiattack.text: The ape makes two Fist attacks.

giant-ape.actions.fist.name: Fist
giant-ape.actions.fist.text: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 10 ft. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) Bludgeoning damage.

giant-ape.actions.boulder-toss.name: Boulder Toss
giant-ape.actions.boulder-toss.text: The ape hurls a boulder at a point it can see within 90 feet. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 17, each creature in a 5-foot-radius Sphere centered on that point. Failure: 24 (7d6) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition. Success: Half damage only.

giant-ape.bonusActions.leap.name: Leap
giant-ape.bonusActions.leap.text: The ape jumps up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.

giant-badger.actions.bite.name: Bite
giant-badger.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (2d4 + 1) Piercing damage.

giant-bat.actions.bite.name: Bite
giant-bat.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage.

giant-boar.traits.bloodied-fury.name: Bloodied Fury
giant-boar.traits.bloodied-fury.text: The boar has Advantage on melee attack rolls while it is Bloodied.

giant-boar.actions.gore.name: Gore
giant-boar.actions.gore.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the boar moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) Piercing damage and has the Prone condition.

giant-centipede.actions.bite.name: Bite
giant-centipede.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the centipede's next turn.

giant-constrictor-snake.actions.multiatt.name: Multiattack
giant-constrictor-snake.actions.multiatt.text: The snake makes one Bite attack and uses Constrict.

giant-constrictor-snake.actions.bite.name: Bite
giant-constrictor-snake.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

giant-constrictor-snake.actions.constric.name: Constrict
giant-constrictor-snake.actions.constric.text: Strength Saving Throw: DC 14, one Large or smaller creature the snake can see within 10 feet. Failure: 13 (2d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14).

giant-crab.traits.amphibious.name: Amphibious
giant-crab.traits.amphibious.text: The crab can breathe air and water.

giant-crab.actions.claw.name: Claw
giant-crab.actions.claw.text: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 11) from one of two claws.

giant-crocodile.traits.hold-breath.name: Hold Breath
giant-crocodile.traits.hold-breath.text: The crocodile can hold its breath for 1 hour.

giant-crocodile.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
giant-crocodile.actions.multiattack.text: The crocodile makes one Bite attack and one Tail attack.

giant-crocodile.actions.bite.name: Bite
