giant-crocodile.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 5 ft. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 15). While Grappled, the target has the Restrained condition and can't be targeted by the crocodile's Tail.

giant-crocodile.actions.tail.name: Tail
giant-crocodile.actions.tail.text: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 10 ft. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

giant-eagle.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
giant-eagle.actions.multiattack.text: The eagle makes two Rend attacks.

giant-eagle.actions.rend.name: Rend
giant-eagle.actions.rend.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Radiant damage.

giant-elk.actions.ram.name: Ram
giant-elk.actions.ram.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 5 (2d4) Radiant damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature and the elk moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 5 (2d4) Bludgeoning damage and has the Prone condition.

giant-fire-beetle.traits.illumination.name: Illumination
giant-fire-beetle.traits.illumination.text: The beetle sheds Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet.

giant-fire-beetle.actions.bite.name: Bite
giant-fire-beetle.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +1, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Fire damage.

giant-frog.traits.amphibious.name: Amphibious
giant-frog.traits.amphibious.text: The frog can breathe air and water.

giant-frog.traits.standing-leap.name: Standing Leap
giant-frog.traits.standing-leap.text: The frog's Long Jump is up to 20 feet and its High Jump is up to 10 feet with or without a running start.

giant-frog.actions.bite.name: Bite
giant-frog.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 11).

giant-frog.actions.swallow.name: Swallow
giant-frog.actions.swallow.text: The frog swallows a Small or smaller target it is grappling. While swallowed, the target isn't Grappled but has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, and it has Total Cover against attacks and other effects outside the frog. While swallowing the target, the frog can't use Bite, and if the frog dies, the swallowed target is no longer Restrained and can escape from the corpse using 5 feet of movement, exiting with the Prone condition. At the end of the frog's next turn, the swallowed target takes 5 (2d4) Acid damage. If that damage doesn't kill it, the frog disgorges it, causing it to exit Prone.

giant-goat.actions.ram.name: Ram
giant-goat.actions.ram.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the goat moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 5 (2d4) Bludgeoning damage and has the Prone condition.

giant-hyena.actions.bite.name: Bite
giant-hyena.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Piercing damage.

giant-hyena.bonusActions.rampage.name: Rampage
giant-hyena.bonusActions.rampage.text: Immediately after dealing damage to a creature that was already Bloodied, the hyena can move up to half its Speed, and it makes one Bite attack.

giant-lizard.traits.spider-climb.name: Spider Climb
giant-lizard.traits.spider-climb.text: The lizard can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

giant-lizard.actions.bite.name: Bite
giant-lizard.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage.

giant-octopus.traits.water-breathing.name: Water Breathing
giant-octopus.traits.water-breathing.text: The octopus can breathe only underwater. It can hold its breath for 1 hour outside water.

giant-octopus.actions.tentacles.name: Tentacles
giant-octopus.actions.tentacles.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 10 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13) from all eight tentacles. While Grappled, the target has the Restrained condition.

giant-octopus.reactions.ink-cloud.name: Ink Cloud
giant-octopus.reactions.ink-cloud.text: Trigger: The octopus takes damage while underwater. Response: The octopus releases ink that fills a 10-foot Cube centered on itself, and the octopus moves up to its Swim Speed. The Cube is Heavily Obscured for 1 minute or until a strong current or similar effect disperses the ink.

giant-owl.traits.flyby.name: Flyby
giant-owl.traits.flyby.text: The owl doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

giant-owl.actions.talons.name: Talons
giant-owl.actions.talons.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) Slashing damage.

giant-owl.actions.spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
giant-owl.actions.spellcasting.text: The owl casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability: At Will: Detect Evil and Good, Detect Magic. 1/Day: Clairvoyance.

giant-rat.traits.pack-tactics.name: Pack Tactics
giant-rat.traits.pack-tactics.text: The rat has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the rat's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

giant-rat.actions.bite.name: Bite
giant-rat.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 feet. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage.

giant-scorpion.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
giant-scorpion.actions.multiattack.text: The scorpion makes two Claw attacks and one Sting attack.

giant-scorpion.actions.claw.name: Claw
giant-scorpion.actions.claw.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13) from one of two claws.

giant-scorpion.actions.sting.name: Sting
giant-scorpion.actions.sting.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage plus 11 (2d10) Poison damage.

giant-seahorse.traits.water-breathing.name: Water Breathing
giant-seahorse.traits.water-breathing.text: The seahorse can breathe only underwater.

giant-seahorse.actions.ram.name: Ram
giant-seahorse.actions.ram.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) Bludgeoning damage, or 11 (2d8 + 2) Bludgeoning damage if the seahorse moved 20+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit.

giant-seahorse.bonusActions.bubble-dash.name: Bubble Dash
giant-seahorse.bonusActions.bubble-dash.text: While underwater, the seahorse moves up to half its Swim Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

giant-shark.traits.water-breathing.name: Water Breathing
giant-shark.traits.water-breathing.text: The shark can breathe only underwater.

giant-shark.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
giant-shark.actions.multiattack.text: The shark makes two Bite attacks.

giant-shark.actions.bite.name: Bite
giant-shark.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +9 (with Advantage if the target doesn't have all its Hit Points), reach 5 ft. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) Piercing damage.

giant-spider.traits.spider-climb.name: Spider Climb
giant-spider.traits.spider-climb.text: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

giant-spider.traits.web-walker.name: Web Walker
giant-spider.traits.web-walker.text: The spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and it knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

giant-spider.actions.bite.name: Bite
giant-spider.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

giant-spider.actions.web.name: Web
giant-spider.actions.web.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 13, one creature the spider can see within 60 feet. Failure: The target has the Restrained condition until the web is destroyed (AC 10; HP 5; Vulnerability to Fire damage; Immunity to Poison and Psychic damage).

giant-toad.traits.amphibious.name: Amphibious
giant-toad.traits.amphibious.text: The toad can breathe air and water.

giant-toad.traits.standing-leap.name: Standing Leap
giant-toad.traits.standing-leap.text: The toad's Long Jump is up to 20 feet and its High Jump is up to 10 feet with or without a running start.

giant-toad.actions.bite.name: Bite
giant-toad.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) Poison damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 12).

giant-toad.actions.swallow.name: Swallow
giant-toad.actions.swallow.text: The toad swallows a Medium or smaller target it is grappling. While swallowed, the target isn't Grappled but has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, and it has Total Cover against attacks and other effects outside the toad. In addition, the target takes 10 (3d6) Acid damage at the end of each of the toad's turns. The toad can have only one target swallowed at a time, and it can't use Bite while it has a swallowed target. If the toad dies, a swallowed creature is no longer Restrained and can escape from the corpse using 5 feet of movement, exiting with the Prone condition.

giant-venomous-snake.actions.bite.name: Bite
giant-venomous-snake.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 10 ft. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) Piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) Poison damage.

giant-vulture.traits.pack-tactics.name: Pack Tactics
giant-vulture.traits.pack-tactics.text: The vulture has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the vulture's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

giant-vulture.actions.gouge.name: Gouge
giant-vulture.actions.gouge.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) Piercing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn.

giant-wasp.traits.flyby.name: Flyby
giant-wasp.traits.flyby.text: The wasp doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

giant-wasp.actions.sting.name: Sting
giant-wasp.actions.sting.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) Poison damage.

giant-weasel.actions.bite.name: Bite
giant-weasel.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage.

giant-wolf-spider.traits.spider-climb.name: Spider Climb
giant-wolf-spider.traits.spider-climb.text: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

giant-wolf-spider.actions.bite.name: Bite
giant-wolf-spider.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) Poison damage.

gibbering-mouther.traits.aberrant-ground.name: Aberrant Ground
gibbering-mouther.traits.aberrant-ground.text: The ground in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the mouther is Difficult Terrain.

gibbering-mouther.traits.gibbering.name: Gibbering
gibbering-mouther.traits.gibbering.text: The mouther babbles incoherently while it doesn't have the Incapacitated condition. Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 10, any creature that starts its turn within 20 feet of the mouther while it is babbling. Failure: The target rolls 1d8 to determine what it does during the current turn: 1–4. The target does nothing. 5–6. The target takes no action or Bonus Action and uses all its movement to move in a random direction. 7–8. The target makes a melee attack against a randomly determined creature within its reach or does nothing if it can't make such an attack.

gibbering-mouther.actions.bite.name: Bite
gibbering-mouther.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (2d6) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition. The target dies if it is reduced to 0 Hit Points by this attack. Its body is then absorbed into the mouther, leaving only equipment behind.

gibbering-mouther.actions.blinding-spitt.name: Blinding Spittle
gibbering-mouther.actions.blinding-spitt.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 10, each creature in a 10-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point within 30 feet. Failure: 7 (2d6) Radiant damage, and the target has the Blinded condition until the end of the mouther's next turn.

glabrezu.traits.demonic-restoration.name: Demonic Restoration
glabrezu.traits.demonic-restoration.text: If the glabrezu dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

glabrezu.traits.magic-resistance.name: Magic Resistance
glabrezu.traits.magic-resistance.text: The glabrezu has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

glabrezu.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
glabrezu.actions.multiattack.text: The glabrezu makes two Pincer attacks and uses Pummel or Spellcasting.

glabrezu.actions.pincer.name: Pincer
glabrezu.actions.pincer.text: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 10 ft. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) Slashing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 15) from one of two pincers.

glabrezu.actions.pummel.name: Pummel
glabrezu.actions.pummel.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 17, one creature Grappled by the glabrezu. Failure: 15 (3d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. Success: Half damage.

glabrezu.actions.spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
glabrezu.actions.spellcasting.text: The glabrezu casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16): At Will: Darkness, Detect Magic, Dispel Magic. 1/Day Each: Confusion, Fly, Power Word Stun.

gladiator.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
gladiator.actions.multiattack.text: The gladiator makes three Spear attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Shield Bash.

gladiator.actions.spear.name: Spear
gladiator.actions.spear.text: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

gladiator.actions.shield-bash.name: Shield Bash
gladiator.actions.shield-bash.text: Strength Saving Throw: DC 15, one creature within 5 feet that the gladiator can see. Failure: 9 (2d4 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

gladiator.reactions.parry.name: Parry
gladiator.reactions.parry.text: Trigger: The gladiator is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. Response: The gladiator adds 3 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

gnoll-warrior.actions.rend.name: Rend
gnoll-warrior.actions.rend.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage.

gnoll-warrior.actions.bone-bow.name: Bone Bow
gnoll-warrior.actions.bone-bow.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +3, range 150/600 ft. Hit: 6 (1d10 + 1) Piercing damage.

gnoll-warrior.bonusActions.rampage.name: Rampage
gnoll-warrior.bonusActions.rampage.text: Immediately after dealing damage to a creature that is already Bloodied, the gnoll moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one Rend attack.

goat.actions.ram.name: Ram
goat.actions.ram.text: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Bludgeoning damage, or 2 (1d4) Bludgeoning damage if the goat moved 20+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit.

goblin-boss.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
goblin-boss.actions.multiattack.text: The goblin makes two attacks, using Scimitar or Shortbow in any combination.

goblin-boss.actions.scimitar.name: Scimitar
goblin-boss.actions.scimitar.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Slashing damage, plus 2 (1d4) Slashing damage if the attack roll had Advantage.

goblin-boss.actions.shortbow.name: Shortbow
goblin-boss.actions.shortbow.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +4, range 80/320 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage, plus 2 (1d4) Piercing damage if the attack roll had Advantage.

goblin-boss.bonusActions.nimble-escape.name: Nimble Escape
goblin-boss.bonusActions.nimble-escape.text: The goblin takes the Disengage or Hide action.

goblin-boss.reactions.redirect-attack.name: Redirect Attack
goblin-boss.reactions.redirect-attack.text: Trigger: A creature the goblin can see makes an attack roll against it. Response: The goblin chooses a Small or Medium ally within 5 feet of itself. The goblin and that ally swap places, and the ally becomes the target of the attack instead.

goblin-minion.actions.dagger.name: Dagger
goblin-minion.actions.dagger.text: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage.

goblin-minion.bonusActions.nimble-escape.name: Nimble Escape
goblin-minion.bonusActions.nimble-escape.text: The goblin takes the Disengage or Hide action.

goblin-warrior.actions.scimitar.name: Scimitar
goblin-warrior.actions.scimitar.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Slashing damage, plus 2 (1d4) Slashing damage if the attack roll had Advantage.

goblin-warrior.actions.shortbow.name: Shortbow
goblin-warrior.actions.shortbow.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +4, range 80/320 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage, plus 2 (1d4) Piercing damage if the attack roll had Advantage.

goblin-warrior.bonusActions.nimble-escap.name: Nimble Escape
goblin-warrior.bonusActions.nimble-escap.text: The goblin takes the Disengage or Hide action.

gold-dragon-wyrmling.traits.amphibious.name: Amphibious
gold-dragon-wyrmling.traits.amphibious.text: The dragon can breathe air and water.

gold-dragon-wyrmling.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
gold-dragon-wyrmling.actions.multiattack.text: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

gold-dragon-wyrmling.actions.rend.name: Rend
gold-dragon-wyrmling.actions.rend.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) Slashing damage.

gold-dragon-wyrmling.actions.fire-breath.name: Fire Breath
gold-dragon-wyrmling.actions.fire-breath.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 22 (4d10) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

gold-dragon-wyrmling.actions.weakening-b.name: Weakening Breath
gold-dragon-wyrmling.actions.weakening-b.text: Strength Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature that isn't currently affected by this breath in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: The target has Disadvantage on Strength-based D20 Tests and subtracts 2 (1d4) from its damage rolls. It repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

gorgon.actions.gore.name: Gore
gorgon.actions.gore.text: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 5 ft. Hit: 18 (2d12 + 5) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the gorgon moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the Prone condition.

gorgon.actions.petrifying-breath.name: Petrifying Breath
gorgon.actions.petrifying-breath.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 15, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. First Failure: The target has the Restrained condition and repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still Restrained, ending the effect on itself on a success. Second Failure: The target has the Petrified condition instead of the Restrained condition.

gorgon.bonusActions.trample.name: Trample
gorgon.bonusActions.trample.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 16, one creature within 5 feet that has the Prone condition. Failure: 16 (2d10 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. Success: Half damage.

gray-ooze.traits.amorphous.name: Amorphous
gray-ooze.traits.amorphous.text: The ooze can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

gray-ooze.traits.corrosive-form.name: Corrosive Form
gray-ooze.traits.corrosive-form.text: Nonmagical ammunition is destroyed immediately after hitting the ooze and dealing any damage. Any nonmagical weapon takes a cumulative −1 penalty to attack rolls immediately after dealing damage to the ooze and coming into contact with it. The weapon is destroyed if the penalty reaches −5. The penalty can be removed by casting the Mending spell on the weapon. The ooze can eat through 2-inch-thick, nonmagical metal or wood in 1 round.

gray-ooze.actions.pseudopod.name: Pseudopod
gray-ooze.actions.pseudopod.text: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d8 + 1) Acid damage. Nonmagical armor worn by the target takes a −1 penalty to the AC it offers. The armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10. The penalty can be removed by casting the Mending spell on the armor.

green-dragon-wyrmling.traits.amphibious.name: Amphibious
green-dragon-wyrmling.traits.amphibious.text: The dragon can breathe air and water.

green-dragon-wyrmling.actions.multiattac.name: Multiattack
green-dragon-wyrmling.actions.multiattac.text: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

green-dragon-wyrmling.actions.rend.name: Rend
green-dragon-wyrmling.actions.rend.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

green-dragon-wyrmling.actions.poison-bre.name: Poison Breath
green-dragon-wyrmling.actions.poison-bre.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 21 (6d6) Poison damage. Success: Half damage.

green-hag.traits.amphibious.name: Amphibious
green-hag.traits.amphibious.text: The hag can breathe air and water.

green-hag.traits.coven-magic.name: Coven Magic
green-hag.traits.coven-magic.text: While within 30 feet of at least two hag allies, the hag can cast one of the following spells, requiring no Material components, using the spell's normal casting time, and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 11): Augury, Find Familiar, Identify, Locate Object, Scrying, or Unseen Servant. The hag must finish a Long Rest before using this trait to cast that spell again.

green-hag.traits.mimicry.name: Mimicry
green-hag.traits.mimicry.text: The hag can mimic animal sounds and humanoid voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations only with a successful DC 14 Wisdom (Insight) check.

green-hag.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
green-hag.actions.multiattack.text: The hag makes two Claw attacks.

green-hag.actions.claw.name: Claw
green-hag.actions.claw.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

green-hag.actions.spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
green-hag.actions.spellcasting.text: The hag casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12, +4 to hit with spell attacks): At Will: Dancing Lights, Disguise Self (24-hour duration), Invisibility (self only, and the hag leaves no tracks while Invisible), Minor Illusion, Ray of Sickness (level 3 version).

grick.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
grick.actions.multiattack.text: The grick makes one Beak attack and one Tentacles attack.

grick.actions.beak.name: Beak
grick.actions.beak.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) Piercing damage.

grick.actions.tentacles.name: Tentacles
grick.actions.tentacles.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) Slashing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 12) from all four tentacles.

griffon.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
griffon.actions.multiattack.text: The griffon makes two Rend attacks.

griffon.actions.rend.name: Rend
griffon.actions.rend.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from both of the griffon's front claws.

grimlock.actions.bone-cudgel.name: Bone Cudgel
grimlock.actions.bone-cudgel.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 2 (1d4) Psychic damage.

guard.actions.spear.name: Spear
guard.actions.spear.text: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) Piercing damage.

guard-captain.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
guard-captain.actions.multiattack.text: The guard makes two attacks, using Javelin or Longsword in any combination.

guard-captain.actions.javelin.name: Javelin
guard-captain.actions.javelin.text: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

guard-captain.actions.longsword.name: Longsword
guard-captain.actions.longsword.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) Slashing damage.

guardian-naga.traits.celestial-restorati.name: Celestial Restoration
guardian-naga.traits.celestial-restorati.text: If the naga dies, it returns to life in 1d6 days and regains all its Hit Points unless Dispel Evil and Good is cast on its remains.

guardian-naga.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
guardian-naga.actions.multiattack.text: The naga makes two Bite attacks. It can replace any attack with a use of Poisonous Spittle.

guardian-naga.actions.bite.name: Bite
guardian-naga.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 10 ft. Hit: 17 (2d12 + 4) Piercing damage plus 22 (4d10) Poison damage.

guardian-naga.actions.poisonous-spittle.name: Poisonous Spittle
guardian-naga.actions.poisonous-spittle.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 16, one creature the naga can see within 60 feet. Failure: 31 (7d8) Poison damage, and the target has the Blinded condition until the start of the naga's next turn. Success: Half damage only.

guardian-naga.actions.spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
guardian-naga.actions.spellcasting.text: The naga casts one of the following spells, requiring no Somatic or Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16): At Will: Thaumaturgy. 1/Day Each: Clairvoyance, Cure Wounds (level 6 version), Flame Strike (level 6 version), Geas, True Seeing.

half-dragon.traits.draconic-origin.name: Draconic Origin
half-dragon.traits.draconic-origin.text: The half-dragon is related to a type of dragon associated with one of the following damage types (GM's choice): Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Poison. This choice affects other aspects of the stat block.

half-dragon.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
half-dragon.actions.multiattack.text: The half-dragon makes two Claw attacks.

half-dragon.actions.claw.name: Claw
half-dragon.actions.claw.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 10 ft. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) damage of the type chosen for the Draconic Origin trait.

half-dragon.actions.dragons-breath.name: Dragon's Breath
half-dragon.actions.dragons-breath.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 14, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. Failure: 28 (8d6) damage of the type chosen for the Draconic Origin trait. Success: Half damage.

half-dragon.bonusActions.leap.name: Leap
half-dragon.bonusActions.leap.text: The half-dragon jumps up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.

harpy.actions.claw.name: Claw
harpy.actions.claw.text: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (2d4 + 1) Slashing damage.

harpy.actions.luring-song.name: Luring Song
harpy.actions.luring-song.text: The harpy sings a magical melody, which lasts until the harpy's Concentration ends on it. Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 11, each Humanoid and Giant in a 300-foot Emanation originating from the harpy when the song starts. Failure: The target has the Charmed condition until the song ends and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns. While Charmed, the target has the Incapacitated condition and ignores the Luring Song of other harpies. If the target is more than 5 feet from the harpy, the target moves on its turn toward the harpy by the most direct route, trying to get within 5 feet of the harpy. It doesn't avoid Opportunity Attacks; however, before moving into damaging terrain (such as lava or a pit) and whenever it takes damage from a source other than the harpy, the target repeats the save. Success: The target is immune to this harpy's Luring Song for 24 hours.

hawk.actions.talons.name: Talons
hawk.actions.talons.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Slashing damage.

hell-hound.traits.pack-tactics.name: Pack Tactics
hell-hound.traits.pack-tactics.text: The hound has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hound's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

hell-hound.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
hell-hound.actions.multiattack.text: The hound makes two Bite attacks.

hell-hound.actions.bite.name: Bite
hell-hound.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

hell-hound.actions.fire-breath.name: Fire Breath
hell-hound.actions.fire-breath.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 17 (5d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

hezrou.traits.demonic-restoration.name: Demonic Restoration
hezrou.traits.demonic-restoration.text: If the hezrou dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

hezrou.traits.magic-resistance.name: Magic Resistance
hezrou.traits.magic-resistance.text: The hezrou has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

hezrou.traits.stench.name: Stench
hezrou.traits.stench.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 16, any creature that starts its turn in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the hezrou. Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition until the start of its next turn.

hezrou.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
hezrou.actions.multiattack.text: The hezrou makes three Rend attacks.

hezrou.actions.rend.name: Rend
hezrou.actions.rend.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) Slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) Poison damage.

hezrou.bonusActions.leap.name: Leap
hezrou.bonusActions.leap.text: The hezrou jumps up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.

hill-giant.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
hill-giant.actions.multiattack.text: The giant makes two attacks, using Tree Club or Trash Lob in any combination.

hill-giant.actions.tree-club.name: Tree Club
hill-giant.actions.tree-club.text: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 10 ft. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

hill-giant.actions.trash-lob.name: Trash Lob
hill-giant.actions.trash-lob.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +8, range 60/240 ft. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn.

hippogriff.traits.flyby.name: Flyby
hippogriff.traits.flyby.text: The hippogriff doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

hippogriff.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
hippogriff.actions.multiattack.text: The hippogriff makes two Rend attacks.

hippogriff.actions.rend.name: Rend
hippogriff.actions.rend.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Slashing damage.

hippopotamus.traits.hold-breath.name: Hold Breath
hippopotamus.traits.hold-breath.text: The hippopotamus can hold its breath for 10 minutes.

hippopotamus.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
hippopotamus.actions.multiattack.text: The hippopotamus makes two Bite attacks.

hippopotamus.actions.bite.name: Bite
hippopotamus.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) Piercing damage.

hobgoblin-captain.traits.aura-of-authori.name: Aura of Authority
hobgoblin-captain.traits.aura-of-authori.text: While in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the hobgoblin, the hobgoblin and its allies have Advantage on attack rolls and saving throws, provided the hobgoblin doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

hobgoblin-captain.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
hobgoblin-captain.actions.multiattack.text: The hobgoblin makes two attacks, using Greatsword or Longbow in any combination.

hobgoblin-captain.actions.greatsword.name: Greatsword
hobgoblin-captain.actions.greatsword.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

hobgoblin-captain.actions.longbow.name: Longbow
hobgoblin-captain.actions.longbow.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +4, range 150/600 ft. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) Poison damage.

hobgoblin-warrior.traits.pack-tactics.name: Pack Tactics
hobgoblin-warrior.traits.pack-tactics.text: The hobgoblin has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hobgoblin's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

hobgoblin-warrior.actions.longsword.name: Longsword
hobgoblin-warrior.actions.longsword.text: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 12 (2d10 + 1) Slashing damage.

hobgoblin-warrior.actions.longbow.name: Longbow
hobgoblin-warrior.actions.longbow.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +3, range 150/600 ft. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) Piercing damage plus 7 (3d4) Poison damage.

homunculus.traits.telepathic-bond.name: Telepathic Bond
homunculus.traits.telepathic-bond.text: While the homunculus is on the same plane of existence as its master, the two of them can communicate telepathically with each other.

homunculus.actions.bite.name: Bite
homunculus.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage, and the target is subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12. Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition until the end of the homunculus's next turn. Failure by 5 or More: The target has the Poisoned condition for 1 minute. While Poisoned, the target has the Unconscious condition, which ends early if the target takes any damage.

horned-devil.traits.diabolical-restorati.name: Diabolical Restoration
horned-devil.traits.diabolical-restorati.text: If the devil dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

horned-devil.traits.magic-resistance.name: Magic Resistance
horned-devil.traits.magic-resistance.text: The devil has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

horned-devil.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
horned-devil.actions.multiattack.text: The devil makes three attacks, using Searing Fork or Hurl Flame in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Infernal Tail.

horned-devil.actions.searing-fork.name: Searing Fork
horned-devil.actions.searing-fork.text: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 10 ft. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) Piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) Fire damage.

horned-devil.actions.hurl-flame.name: Hurl Flame
horned-devil.actions.hurl-flame.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +8, range 150 ft. Hit: 26 (5d8 + 4) Fire damage. If the target is a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it starts burning.

horned-devil.actions.infernal-tail.name: Infernal Tail
horned-devil.actions.infernal-tail.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 17, one creature the devil can see within 10 feet. Failure: 10 (1d8 + 6) Necrotic damage, and the target receives an infernal wound if it doesn't have one. While wounded, the target loses 10 (3d6) Hit Points at the start of each of its turns. The wound closes after 1 minute, after a spell restores Hit Points to the target, or after the target or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to stanch the wound, doing so by succeeding on a DC 17 Wisdom (Medicine) check.

hunter-shark.traits.water-breathing.name: Water Breathing
hunter-shark.traits.water-breathing.text: The shark can breathe only underwater.

hunter-shark.actions.bite.name: Bite
hunter-shark.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6 (with Advantage if the target doesn't have all its Hit Points), reach 5 ft. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

hydra.traits.hold-breath.name: Hold Breath
hydra.traits.hold-breath.text: The hydra can hold its breath for 1 hour.

hydra.traits.multiple-heads.name: Multiple Heads
hydra.traits.multiple-heads.text: The hydra has five heads. Whenever the hydra takes 25 damage or more on a single turn, one of its heads dies. The hydra dies if all its heads are dead. At the end of each of its turns when it has at least one living head, the hydra grows two heads for each of its heads that died since its last turn, unless it has taken Fire damage since its last turn. The hydra regains 20 Hit Points when it grows new heads.

hydra.traits.reactive-heads.name: Reactive Heads
hydra.traits.reactive-heads.text: For each head the hydra has beyond one, it gets an extra Reaction that can be used only for Opportunity Attacks.

hydra.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
hydra.actions.multiattack.text: The hydra makes as many Bite attacks as it has heads.

hydra.actions.bite.name: Bite
hydra.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 10 ft. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) Piercing damage.

hyena.traits.pack-tactics.name: Pack Tactics
hyena.traits.pack-tactics.text: The hyena has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hyena's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

hyena.actions.bite.name: Bite
hyena.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 3 (1d6) Piercing damage.

ice-devil.traits.diabolical-restoration.name: Diabolical Restoration
ice-devil.traits.diabolical-restoration.text: If the devil dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

ice-devil.traits.magic-resistance.name: Magic Resistance
ice-devil.traits.magic-resistance.text: The devil has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

ice-devil.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
ice-devil.actions.multiattack.text: The devil makes three Ice Spear attacks. It can replace one attack with a Tail attack.

ice-devil.actions.ice-spear.name: Ice Spear
ice-devil.actions.ice-spear.text: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +10, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) Piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) Cold damage. Until the end of its next turn, the target can't take a Bonus Action or Reaction, its Speed decreases by 10 feet, and it can move or take one action on its turn, not both. Hit or Miss: The spear magically returns to the devil's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

ice-devil.actions.tail.name: Tail
ice-devil.actions.tail.text: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 10 ft. Hit: 15 (3d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) Cold damage.

ice-devil.actions.ice-wall.name: Ice Wall
ice-devil.actions.ice-wall.text: The devil casts Wall of Ice (level 8 version), requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17).

ice-mephit.traits.death-burst.name: Death Burst
ice-mephit.traits.death-burst.text: The mephit explodes when it dies. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 10, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the mephit. Failure: 5 (2d4) Cold damage. Success: Half damage.

ice-mephit.actions.claw.name: Claw
ice-mephit.actions.claw.text: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) Slashing damage plus 2 (1d4) Cold damage.

ice-mephit.actions.fog-cloud.name: Fog Cloud
ice-mephit.actions.fog-cloud.text: The mephit casts Fog Cloud, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

ice-mephit.actions.frost-breath.name: Frost Breath
ice-mephit.actions.frost-breath.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 10, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 7 (3d4) Cold damage. Success: Half damage.

imp.traits.magic-resistance.name: Magic Resistance
imp.traits.magic-resistance.text: The imp has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

imp.actions.sting.name: Sting
imp.actions.sting.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

imp.actions.invisibility.name: Invisibility
imp.actions.invisibility.text: The imp casts Invisibility on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

imp.actions.shape-shift.name: Shape-Shift
imp.actions.shape-shift.text: The imp shape-shifts to resemble a rat (Speed 20 ft.), a raven (20 ft., Fly 60 ft.), or a spider (20 ft., Climb 20 ft.), or it returns to its true form. Its game statistics are the same in each form, except for its Speed. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

incubus.traits.succubus-form.name: Succubus Form
incubus.traits.succubus-form.text: When the incubus finishes a Long Rest, it can shape-shift into a Succubus, using that stat block instead of this one. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

incubus.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
incubus.actions.multiattack.text: The incubus makes two Restless Touch attacks.

incubus.actions.restless-touch.name: Restless Touch
incubus.actions.restless-touch.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 15 (3d6 + 5) Psychic damage, and the target is cursed for 24 hours or until the incubus dies. Until the curse ends, the target gains no benefit from finishing Short Rests.

incubus.actions.spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
incubus.actions.spellcasting.text: The incubus casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15): At Will: Disguise Self, Etherealness. 1/Day Each: Dream, Hypnotic Pattern.

incubus.bonusActions.nightmare.name: Nightmare
incubus.bonusActions.nightmare.text: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 15, one creature the incubus can see within 60 feet. Failure: If the target has 20 Hit Points or fewer, it has the Unconscious condition for 1 hour, until it takes damage, or until a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to wake it. Otherwise, the target takes 18 (4d8) Psychic damage.

invisible-stalker.traits.air-form.name: Air Form
invisible-stalker.traits.air-form.text: The stalker can enter an enemy's space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

invisible-stalker.traits.invisibility.name: Invisibility
invisible-stalker.traits.invisibility.text: The stalker has the Invisible condition.

invisible-stalker.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
invisible-stalker.actions.multiattack.text: The stalker makes three Wind Swipe attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Vortex.

invisible-stalker.actions.wind-swipe.name: Wind Swipe
invisible-stalker.actions.wind-swipe.text: Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Force damage.

invisible-stalker.actions.vortex.name: Vortex
invisible-stalker.actions.vortex.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 14, one Large or smaller creature in the stalker's space. Failure: 7 (1d8 + 3) Thunder damage, and the target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13). Until the grapple ends, the target can't cast spells with a Verbal component and takes 7 (2d6) Thunder damage at the start of each of the stalker's turns.

iron-golem.traits.fire-absorption.name: Fire Absorption
iron-golem.traits.fire-absorption.text: Whenever the golem is subjected to Fire damage, it regains a number of Hit Points equal to the Fire damage dealt.

iron-golem.traits.magic-resistance.name: Magic Resistance
iron-golem.traits.magic-resistance.text: The golem has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

iron-golem.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
iron-golem.actions.multiattack.text: The golem makes two attacks, using Bladed Arm or Fiery Bolt in any combination.

iron-golem.actions.bladed-arm.name: Bladed Arm
iron-golem.actions.bladed-arm.text: Melee Attack Roll: +12, reach 10 ft. Hit: 20 (3d8 + 7) Slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) Fire damage.

iron-golem.actions.fiery-bolt.name: Fiery Bolt
iron-golem.actions.fiery-bolt.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +10, range 120 ft. Hit: 36 (8d8) Fire damage.

iron-golem.actions.poison-breath.name: Poison Breath
iron-golem.actions.poison-breath.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 18, each creature in a 60-foot Cone. Failure: 55 (10d10) Poison damage. Success: Half damage.

jackal.actions.bite.name: Bite
jackal.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +1, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 (1d4 - 1) Piercing damage.

killer-whale.traits.hold-breath.name: Hold Breath
killer-whale.traits.hold-breath.text: The whale can hold its breath for 30 minutes.

killer-whale.actions.bite.name: Bite
killer-whale.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 21 (5d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

knight.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
knight.actions.multiattack.text: The knight makes two attacks, using Greatsword or Heavy Crossbow in any combination.

knight.actions.greatsword.name: Greatsword
knight.actions.greatsword.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage plus 4 (1d8) Radiant damage.

knight.actions.heavy-crossbow.name: Heavy Crossbow
knight.actions.heavy-crossbow.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +2, range 100/400 ft. Hit: 11 (2d10) Piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) Radiant damage.

knight.reactions.parry.name: Parry
knight.reactions.parry.text: Trigger: The knight is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. Response: The knight adds 2 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

kobold-warrior.traits.pack-tactics.name: Pack Tactics
kobold-warrior.traits.pack-tactics.text: The kobold has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the kobold's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

kobold-warrior.traits.sunlight-sensitivi.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
kobold-warrior.traits.sunlight-sensitivi.text: While in sunlight, the kobold has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

kobold-warrior.actions.dagger.name: Dagger
kobold-warrior.actions.dagger.text: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage.

kraken.traits.amphibious.name: Amphibious
kraken.traits.amphibious.text: The kraken can breathe air and water.

kraken.traits.legendary-resistance.name: Legendary Resistance
kraken.traits.legendary-resistance.text: (4/Day, or 5/Day in Lair) If the kraken fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

kraken.traits.siege-monster.name: Siege Monster
kraken.traits.siege-monster.text: The kraken deals double damage to objects and structures.

kraken.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
kraken.actions.multiattack.text: The kraken makes two Tentacle attacks and uses Fling, Lightning Strike, or Swallow.

kraken.actions.tentacle.name: Tentacle
kraken.actions.tentacle.text: Melee Attack Roll: +17, reach 30 ft. Hit: 24 (4d6 + 10) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 20) from one of ten tentacles, and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

kraken.actions.fling.name: Fling
kraken.actions.fling.text: The kraken throws a Large or smaller creature Grappled by it to a space it can see within 60 feet of itself that isn't in the air. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 25, the creature thrown and each creature in the destination space. Failure: 18 (4d8) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Prone condition. Success: Half damage only.

kraken.actions.lightning-strike.name: Lightning Strike
kraken.actions.lightning-strike.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 23, one creature the kraken can see within 120 feet. Failure: 33 (6d10) Lightning damage. Success: Half damage.

kraken.actions.swallow.name: Swallow
kraken.actions.swallow.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 25, one creature Grappled by the kraken (it can have up to four creatures swallowed at a time). Failure: 23 (3d8 + 10) Piercing damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it is swallowed and no longer Grappled. A swallowed creature has the Restrained condition, has Total Cover against attacks and other effects outside the kraken, and takes 24 (7d6) Acid damage at the start of each of its turns. If the kraken takes 50 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the kraken must succeed on a DC 25 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 10 feet of the kraken with the Prone condition. If the kraken dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the Restrained condition and can escape from the corpse using 15 feet of movement, exiting Prone.

kraken.legendaryActions.toxic-ink.name: Toxic Ink
kraken.legendaryActions.toxic-ink.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 23, each creature in a 15-foot Emanation originating from the kraken while it is underwater. Failure: The target has the Blinded and Poisoned conditions until the end of the kraken's next turn. The kraken then moves up to its Speed. Failure or Success: The kraken can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

priest.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
priest.actions.multiattack.text: The priest makes two attacks, using Mace or Radiant Flame in any combination.

priest.actions.mace.name: Mace
priest.actions.mace.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 5 (2d4) Radiant damage.

priest.actions.radiant-flame.name: Radiant Flame
priest.actions.radiant-flame.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 60 ft. Hit: 11 (2d10) Radiant damage.

priest.actions.spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
priest.actions.spellcasting.text: The priest casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13): At Will: Light, Thaumaturgy. 1/Day: Spirit Guardians.

priest.bonusActions.divine-aid.name: Divine Aid
priest.bonusActions.divine-aid.text: The priest casts Bless, Dispel Magic, Healing Word, or Lesser Restoration, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

rat.traits.agile.name: Agile
rat.traits.agile.text: The rat doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it moves out of an enemy's reach.

rat.actions.bite.name: Bite
rat.actions.bite.text: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

skeleton.actions.shortsword.name: Shortsword
skeleton.actions.shortsword.text: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage.

skeleton.actions.shortbow.name: Shortbow
skeleton.actions.shortbow.text: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 80/320 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage.

swarm-of-rats.traits.swarm.name: Swarm
swarm-of-rats.traits.swarm.text: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny rat. The swarm can't regain Hit Points or gain Temporary Hit Points.

swarm-of-rats.actions.bites.name: Bites
swarm-of-rats.actions.bites.text: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (2d4) Piercing damage, or 2 (1d4) Piercing damage if the swarm is Bloodied.

young-red-dragon.actions.multiattack.name: Multiattack
young-red-dragon.actions.multiattack.text: The dragon makes three Rend attacks.

young-red-dragon.actions.rend.name: Rend
young-red-dragon.actions.rend.text: Melee Attack Roll: +10, reach 10 ft. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

young-red-dragon.actions.fire-breath.name: Fire Breath
young-red-dragon.actions.fire-breath.text: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 17, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. Failure: 56 (16d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

zombie.traits.undead-fortitude.name: Undead Fortitude
zombie.traits.undead-fortitude.text: If damage reduces the zombie to 0 Hit Points, it makes a Constitution saving throw (DC 5 plus the damage taken) unless the damage is Radiant or from a Critical Hit. On a successful save, the zombie drops to 1 Hit Point instead.

zombie.actions.slam.name: Slam
zombie.actions.slam.text: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) Bludgeoning damage.
